source_set: Current chat composite covering dashboard concept, RAG lifecycle, DDNA dependency, and output-to-GitHub-to-JSON parity

control_findings.ddna_governance: Can begin now as file-based extraction, staging, and decision support.
control_findings.ddna_runtime: Held until RAG + pgvector is operational, tested, seeded, audited, and baselined.
control_findings.output_parity_rule: One audit output, its GitHub commit, and its Tribunal JSON receipt must match in controlling facts.
control_findings.rag_scope: Candidate only. No live activation authorized by this packet.

five_layer_extraction.sentiment: Governance urgency, precision requirement, build discipline, and forward posture.
five_layer_extraction.logic: Output parity rule, governance-runtime split, RAG dependency, audit sequence, and missing audit lanes.
five_layer_extraction.design: TSL dashboard product pattern, Command Post audit surface, responsive rebuild priority, and public-private surface separation.
five_layer_extraction.product: TSL dashboard, SC-Gov-OS RAG, DDNA product matrix, CTJ audit, and protected audit routing.
five_layer_extraction.technical: pgvector candidate state, access-control testing, seed approval, pre-embedding classification, Tribunal parity, and future baseline receipt.

candidate_assets: DDNA-ASSET-20260621-004 DDNA Governance vs Runtime Split
payload.next_section_starting_point: DDNA is active as governance before RAG is active as runtime. The current audit set becomes the first governed signal corpus, while RAG + pgvector remains the future retrieval engine after DCS decision, Qwen review, database provisioning, content seeding, retrieval testing, classification testing, and baseline.
required_dcs_decisions: Hold DDNA runtime pending RAG + pgvector operational state
Hold embedding until seed approval and classification checks
Authorize CTJ audit as next public product audit
Authorize protected audit separately inside its proper lane
Approve RAG MVP scope before pgvector provisioning
notes: Connector created the report and receipt as sequential GitHub content commits rather than a single local atomic commit.
D04 atomic pairing is preserved logically by this receipt referencing the report commit and report path.
Strict local atomic squashing can be performed later by a CLI-capable agent if DCS requires a single commit pair.
